violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep unit shelves, under grill shelves, and hood vents) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Handwashing sink in kitchen is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Strainer were observed in the hand-washing sink at bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service and ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

(Pasta), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (pasta) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep.PIC informed and disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

(Fish) was observed thawing on sheet pans on bakers rack. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Working containers of (dry spices) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Inspector observed salad being stored in refrigerator uncovered. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Inspector observed knife between stored between prep unit and table. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the (prep units, refrigerator, shelves under grill, hood vents, and bakers rack ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The floors in the ice machine area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
